# Vendors / Partner Programs (Canonical)

One doc per vendor/partner program. Confirmed, active, or verified programs
live directly at this root. Anything still in-process or unconfirmed goes in
`_processing/` until it's activated — then move it up to root.

Cross-reference `../partner-credit-map.md` for tiering/GTM strategy across
the whole set.
